title: anemone obtusiloba subsp. rockii
intro: Anemone obtusiloba subsp. rockii, also known as the Rock's anemone or Korean anemone, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of A. obtusiloba subsp. rockii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is often dried and used in decoctions or infusions to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
